subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the ninth of Rajab 339 was received. I am compelled to be brief in reply [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه که بتاریخ ۹ شهر رجب ۳۳۹ بود رسید در جواب باختصار مجبورم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @education of children; moral education, @praise and encouragement
